prompt: Create an ultra-realistic candid editorial photograph inside a warm, crowded apartment kitchen during a casual house party. Center a young woman, unnamed young woman, facing the camera with a calm, slightly tired neutral expression, full face visible and natural skin texture. She has long softly wavy medium brown hair parted near the center, warm olive skin, minimal makeup, and relaxed posture. She wears an oversized vintage FC Barcelona home jersey with red and navy vertical stripes, yellow Nike swoosh, club crest, and UNICEF sponsor tucked loosely into high-waisted faded blue jeans, one hand in her pocket and the other arm hanging by her side. The scene is a cramped kitchen with golden tungsten lighting, a bright ceiling lamp glow, shallow depth of field, and a subtle rainbow lens flare crossing the lower-left area of her shirt. Around her are exactly 5 visible background party guests: one young man in a dark hoodie and baseball cap talking on the left, one person with a dark bob seen from behind near center-left, one person in a light shirt seen from behind in the rear center, one young man in a dark hoodie and backward cap holding a bottle on the right, and one partially visible young woman behind him. Include cluttered party details: kitchen counter on the right with green glass bottles, cans, red plastic cups, pizza boxes, snack containers, and miscellaneous food; wooden shelves and books on the left; warm cabinets and soft background blur. Use a 1:1 square crop, waist-up to mid-thigh framing, subject centered, eye-level camera, 35mm documentary photography feel, realistic skin, natural grain, cinematic warm color grading, no posing, no studio lighting, no extra text beyond the jersey logos.
